allow: Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('Hierarchical_ReLU_LoRA_Spawning_Proposal.pdf'\); [print\(f'=== PAGE {i+1} ===\\n{p.extract_text\(\)}'\) for i,p in enumerate\(pdf.pages\)]")

Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; r=PyPDF2.PdfReader\('Hierarchical_ReLU_LoRA_Spawning_Proposal.pdf'\); [print\(f'=== PAGE {i+1} ===\\n{r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)}'\) for i in range\(len\(r.pages\)\)]")
